integration_validation_v2.evidence: atelier/media.rs:929-1021 materialize_media_asset does content-hash dedup via get_media_asset_by_hash + ON CONFLICT(content_hash) DO NOTHING, validates native ArtifactStore handle; atelier_foundation_tests.rs:95-121 asserts identical content_hash dedups to same asset_id using real write_native_media_artifact (atelier_pg_support.rs:89-130 writes+validates real manifest).

integration_validation_v3.basis: v2 PASS re-affirmed in v3: deliverable unchanged by remediation diff; full-crate test sweep green on Handshake-managed PostgreSQL at 17b2abd4 proves no regression. v2 evidence retained in integration_validation_v2.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

and relation fields stable across file moves.
